top_findings: SPA render gap: all 12 sitemap URLs serve blank HTML to AI crawlers and social scrapers
Static canonical hardcoded to / — Google collapses all inner pages into one
950ms preloader + no image preload pushes LCP above 3,000ms on mobile
Font Awesome CDN: 102KB render-blocking stylesheet from third-party origin
Non-ISO datePublished in BlogPosting schema rejects Google Rich Results eligibility
quick_wins: Expand Person schema to @graph (Person + WebSite + ProfilePage) — 30 min, immediate AI crawler signal improvement
Add isoDate fields to blog.js — 15 min, unblocks Rich Results eligibility
Add preconnect for fonts.gstatic.com — 5 min, ~200ms font load improvement
Redirect old Vercel preview URL — 10 min no-code, consolidates name search authority
Convert og-image.svg to PNG — 20 min, fixes broken LinkedIn/WhatsApp previews

categories.name: Technical SEO
what_works: robots.txt present and correct — all crawlers allowed, sitemap referenced
Sitemap covers all 12 routes with appropriate priority values
HSTS correctly configured via Vercel
HTTP/2 confirmed on all routes
CDN cache HIT from Vercel edge

findings.title: SPA: All inner pages serve blank HTML to crawlers
findings.description:
Every URL serves identical raw HTML:
. Non-Google AI crawlers never execute JS. Static canonical points all 12 routes to /.
findings.recommendation: Implement vite-ssg for static pre-rendering. Each route gets a pre-rendered HTML file at build time.

findings.title: Soft 404s: Unknown routes return HTTP 200
findings.description: Typo URLs (/project/buy4-chai, /blog/wrong-slug) return HTTP 200 with blank SPA shell — wasting crawl budget and creating thin-content entries.
findings.recommendation: Add <meta name='robots' content='noindex'> from the client-side 404 render state.

findings.title: Security headers absent
findings.description: X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, Referrer-Policy not present in response headers.
findings.recommendation: Add headers config to vercel.json.

findings.title: Cache-Control on /assets/* not immutable
findings.description: Vite content-hashed assets should be served with max-age=31536000, immutable for optimal repeat-visitor performance.
findings.recommendation: Add immutable cache-control header for /assets/* in vercel.json.

categories.name: Content Quality (E-E-A-T)
what_works: 5 blog posts with specific, first-person, data-backed writing
Real E-E-A-T signals: India Innovates Top 1k (26,000+ entries), Zenodo preprint, MIT-licensed open source, 13 GitHub stars
Project case studies have clear problem/solution/impact framing
Content is genuine — not generated or templated

findings.title: Blog post title opaque to search intent
findings.description: building-buy4chai titled 'The gap nobody was filling.' — users searching 'Indian developer Stripe alternative' won't click it despite the post being exactly what they need.
findings.recommendation: Retitle to something that surfaces the keyword angle while keeping voice, e.g. 'Why Indian developers can't get paid online — and how I fixed it'.

findings.title: No author byline on blog posts
findings.description: Individual BlogPost.jsx renders don't show the author name — Google's 'Who' quality heuristic is unmet.
findings.recommendation: Add 'by Shoryavardhaan Gupta' to the post header in BlogPost.jsx.

findings.title: No H2/H3 headings inside blog post bodies
findings.description: Native posts (building-buy4chai, markets-dont-get-disrupted) are ~250 words with no internal structure — reads as thin and hard to scan.
findings.recommendation: Add {type:'heading'} blocks in blog.js and render in BlogPost.jsx.

findings.title: No internal links in blog content
findings.description: Buy4Chai post doesn't link to /project/buy4chai. Hardware post doesn't link to /project/lifi-network. Missed PageRank distribution and topical signal.
findings.recommendation: Add cross-links between related blog posts and project pages.

findings.title: No narrative origin post
findings.description: No post targeting '16 year old developer India' or 'student builder Kolkata' — the intent that would most naturally reach this portfolio's audience.
findings.recommendation: Write a first-person origin story post.

categories.name: On-Page SEO
what_works: Meta description present in static HTML
OG tags and Twitter Card present
Dynamic per-route title/description injection via useEffect is architecturally correct
Sitemap priorities appropriate (/ = 1.0, /blog = 0.9, posts = 0.8, projects = 0.8)

findings.title: All inner pages have homepage metadata at crawl time
findings.description: Dynamic meta injection runs after JS. At first-wave crawl time, /blog/building-buy4chai has title 'Shoryavardhaan Gupta' and canonical /.
findings.recommendation: Resolved by vite-ssg (C1).

findings.title: Image alt text empty on all images
findings.description: All img elements across BlogPost.jsx, BlogIndex.jsx, ProjectPage.jsx have alt='' — fails accessibility and image search.
findings.recommendation: Add alt={post.title} or alt={proj.name} to all image elements.

findings.title: Unused Space Grotesk font weights
findings.description: 5 weights of Space Grotesk loaded from Google Fonts but none used in the actual CSS.
findings.recommendation: Remove Space Grotesk from the fonts URL in index.html.

categories.name: Schema / Structured Data
what_works: Person schema present in static HTML (rare for SPAs — good foundation)
Dynamic BlogPosting and SoftwareApplication schema injection architecture is correct
sitemap.xml and robots.txt reference correct

findings.title: Person schema missing key entity signals
findings.description: Missing @id, description, birthDate, knowsAbout, award, memberOf, alternateName. These fields are what AI crawlers read to understand entity identity.
findings.recommendation: Replace with @graph containing Person + WebSite + ProfilePage. Full replacement JSON in FULL-AUDIT-REPORT.md H4.

findings.title: datePublished non-ISO in BlogPosting schema
findings.description: post.date stores 'May 2026' — Google Rich Results tester rejects non-ISO 8601 dates. Blog posts ineligible for rich results.
findings.recommendation: Add isoDate field to each post in blog.js. Use post.isoDate ?? post.date in App.jsx.

findings.title: BlogPosting schema missing required fields
findings.description: Missing mainEntityOfPage (required for rich results), wrong publisher type, missing articleSection, wordCount, dateModified.
findings.recommendation: Update the BlogPosting jsonld block in App.jsx.

findings.title: BreadcrumbList absent on project/blog pages
findings.description: No BreadcrumbList schema — missing the SERP breadcrumb rich result.
findings.recommendation: Add BreadcrumbList to the dynamic jsonld graph in App.jsx for project and blog routes.

findings.title: /blog index has no structured data
findings.description: The BlogIndex route at /blog emits no JSON-LD.
findings.recommendation: Add Blog schema in the isBlogIndex branch of the meta useEffect in App.jsx.

categories.name: Performance (CWV)
what_works: Vercel CDN serves from edge — base latency is low
HTTP/2 multiplexing active
Framer Motion's layout animation approach avoids forced reflows

findings.title: 950ms preloader hard-blocks LCP
findings.description: The setTimeout(950) in the preloader guarantees LCP cannot occur before ~950ms. On mobile with JS parse time, real-world LCP exceeds 3,000ms (poor threshold).
findings.recommendation: Reduce to ≤300ms or fire on font-load event. Add fetchpriority='high' to hero image.

findings.title: Font Awesome: render-blocking CDN stylesheet
findings.description: 102KB CSS from cdnjs.cloudflare.com + 3 woff2 font files from 3rd-party origin block FCP/LCP. Only 8 icons used site-wide.
findings.recommendation: Remove CDN link. Replace 8 <i fa-*> elements with inline SVGs.

findings.title: 5 concurrent RAF loops — INP risk
findings.description: DotGrid, smooth scroll, cursor glow, hero parallax, and Footer liquid all run simultaneously at 60fps. Combined cost exceeds 16ms budget on budget Android.
findings.recommendation: Move DotGrid to OffscreenCanvas + Web Worker. Merge cursor + hero parallax RAFs.

findings.title: 1758438412149.png is 746 KB
findings.description: PNG photograph at 746 KB. WebP conversion targets <80 KB at equivalent quality.
findings.recommendation: Convert to WebP. Consider srcset for responsive sizes.

findings.title: syi.png is 309 KB
findings.description: PNG photograph at 309 KB. WebP target <40 KB.
findings.recommendation: Convert to WebP.

findings.title: DotGrid RAF runs during preloader
findings.description: Canvas physics loop starts before preloader exits — wasted CPU during the phase when LCP measurement is already blocked.
findings.recommendation: Delay DotGrid RAF start until preloader unmounts.

categories.name: AI Search Readiness (GEO)
what_works: robots.txt allows all AI crawlers including GPTBot, Claude-Web, PerplexityBot
Person schema in static HTML is the one piece AI crawlers can read

findings.title: All content invisible to AI crawlers — SPA render gap
findings.description: ChatGPT, Perplexity, ClaudeBot never execute JavaScript. All 12 content-bearing routes return blank HTML. AI tools cannot cite or summarize any page content.
findings.recommendation: Resolved by vite-ssg (C1). Until then, the expanded Person schema (H4) in static index.html is the only mitigation.

findings.title: Old Vercel preview URL competing for name queries
findings.description: portfolio-vassu-vs-projects.vercel.app indexed by Google, appears in SERPs for 'Shoryavardhaan Gupta' — AI tools may cite the preview URL instead of production.
findings.recommendation: Redirect in Vercel dashboard (1.5 in ACTION-PLAN.md).

findings.title: No llms.txt
findings.description: No /llms.txt for AI crawler optionality. Currently non-blocking, but becomes useful as the standard adoption grows.
findings.recommendation: Create minimal /llms.txt pointing to key pages.

categories.name: Images
what_works: OG image present and referenced
Hero photo loads from /public/ without build-time transform

findings.title: OG image is SVG — breaks social previews
findings.description: LinkedIn, Facebook, WhatsApp, iMessage scrapers don't render SVG. All shared links show blank/broken preview images.
findings.recommendation: Export og-image.png at 1200x630. Update index.html and App.jsx BASE_IMG.

findings.title: alt='' on all img elements
findings.description: Empty alt text fails WCAG 2.1 AA and makes all images invisible to Google Image Search.
findings.recommendation: See M4 in content category.

findings.title: No srcset on hero image
findings.description: Mobile visitors download the same image as desktop. A WebP srcset would halve the payload for most visitors.
findings.recommendation: Add srcset with WebP variants in Hero.jsx.

findings.title: loading='lazy' absent on below-fold images
findings.description: Highlights, About, and Projects images load eagerly even on initial pageload.
findings.recommendation: Add loading='lazy' to all below-fold img elements.

phases.name: Phase 1: Critical Fixes
items: 1.1 Expand Person schema to @graph in index.html (30 min)
1.2 Add isoDate to blog.js posts + update App.jsx (15 min)
1.3 Convert og-image.svg to og-image.png (20 min)
1.4 Add preconnect hints to index.html (5 min)
1.5 Redirect old Vercel preview URL in dashboard (10 min)

phases.name: Phase 2: High-Impact Improvements
items: 2.1 Add noindex meta to 404 render state (30 min)
2.2 Add author byline to BlogPost.jsx (15 min)
2.3 Complete BlogPosting schema — mainEntityOfPage, publisher, BreadcrumbList (20 min)
2.4 Add security headers and immutable cache to vercel.json (20 min)
2.5 Reduce preloader setTimeout to ≤300ms (10 min)
2.6 Add BreadcrumbList to dynamic schemas (20 min)

phases.name: Phase 3: Content & Authority
items: 3.1 Add H2/H3 headings to native blog posts
3.2 Fix image alt text on all img elements
3.3 Add internal links in blog content
3.4 Add Blog schema on /blog route
3.5 Convert syi.png and 1758438412149.png to WebP
3.6 Remove unused Space Grotesk font weights
3.7 Retitle Buy4Chai post for search intent

phases.name: Phase 4: Architecture
items: 4.1 Implement vite-ssg for static pre-rendering (highest leverage — fixes root cause of 60% of findings)
4.2 Replace Font Awesome CDN with inline SVGs
4.3 Move DotGrid to OffscreenCanvas + Web Worker
4.4 Create /llms.txt
